locations.name: 瓦哈卡州
locations.summary: 瓦哈卡州（西班牙語：Oaxaca，發音：[waˈχaka] ）是墨西哥合眾國的一個州，位於該國的南部，臨太平洋。2005年估計人口為 3,506,821人。首府瓦哈卡市。 历史 名称 瓦哈卡的州名来自其首府瓦哈卡市的名称。这个名字来自纳瓦…

relations.subject: Greater pewee
relations.evidence: minor is found from east of the Isthmus of Tehuantepec intermittently through Guatemala, Belize, El Salvador, and Honduras into far north-central Nicaragua. The nominate subspecies occurs as a vagrant in California and migrates in small numbers through western Texas. The greater pewee primarily inhabits pine and pine-oak forest in the subtropical and temperate zones. In migration and to some extent during the non-breeding season it also occurs in deciduous riparian forest within pine and pine-oak forest but not within more open areas.
